alert.no_demo_footage:
No demo footage found on this server.

Run `opencut-server --download-demo` or use the installer build.
audio.beats_desc: Detect the tempo and beat positions in your music for rhythm-synced editing.
audio.denoise_desc: Reduce background noise, hum, and hiss from your audio.
audio.duck_desc: Automatically lower background music when someone is speaking. Select your voice clip above, then provide the music file below.
audio.effects_desc: Quick audio effects  -- reverb, echo, pitch shift, bass boost, and creative voice transforms.
audio.enhance_desc: Upgrade low-quality speech to studio quality using AI super-resolution.
audio.loudmatch_desc: Normalize multiple clips to a common integrated LUFS target.
audio.music_ai_desc: Generate original music from a text description. Describe a mood, genre, or style and get a unique track. GPU recommended.
audio.normalize_desc: Match your audio loudness to platform standards so your content sounds consistent everywhere.
audio.separate_desc: Split audio into vocals, drums, bass, and instruments. Extract vocals for remixes or remove music from dialogue.
audio.sfx_desc: Create swooshes, impacts, risers, and tones for transitions and alerts. No extra installs needed.
audio.studio_desc: Studio-grade compressor, EQ, de-esser, limiter, reverb, and more. Processes audio in real-time.
audio.tts_desc: Generate voiceovers and narration from text. 400+ natural voices in 75+ languages.
assistant.dismissed_empty: All suggestions dismissed. Refresh to re-scan.
assistant.empty_good: Your sequence looks good — no obvious next edits.
assistant.open_sequence_required: Open a sequence in Premiere and try again.
batch.operation_choose_title: Choose the process you want to apply across the queue.
batch.operation_ready_title: {operation} will run across the queued clips.
batch.poll_failed_summary: Batch status polling failed repeatedly. Results may still finish in the background.

batch.status_ready: Batch is ready to run {operation} across {count} queued clips.
batch.status_reconnect: Reconnect the backend before running batch processing across multiple clips.
captions.animated_desc: CapCut-style animated word-by-word captions with pop, fade, bounce, and glow effects.
captions.burnin_desc: Permanently burn captions into the video. Use when your platform doesn't support subtitle files.
captions.chapters_desc: Use an LLM to generate YouTube chapter markers from the transcript.
captions.display_defaults_loaded: Defaults loaded. Adjust tokens then Preview.
captions.display_preview_updated: Preview updated. These display tokens apply to caption burn-in.
captions.display_reset_defaults: Reset to FCC defaults. Click Preview to re-render.
captions.display_sample_text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
captions.display_schema_load_failed: Could not load FCC token schema.
captions.karaoke_desc: Word-by-word karaoke-style captions with smooth fill animation. Perfect for lyric videos and music content.
captions.repeat_desc: Detect and cut duplicate or repeated spoken takes using transcript similarity.
captions.srt_parsed_no_premiere: SRT parsed ({count} segments), no Premiere connection
captions.srt_import_desc: Parse an SRT file and inject caption segments into the active Premiere sequence as native captions.
captions.translate_desc: Translate your captions into 200+ languages. Runs fully offline after a one-time model download.
cut.auto_edit_desc: Detect and remove static/boring segments using visual motion analysis.
cut.filler_desc: Find and remove filler words like "um", "uh", "like", and "you know" using AI speech recognition.
cut.full_desc: One-click cleanup: remove silences, strip fillers, add captions, and auto-zoom  -- all at once.
cut.highlights_desc: Use AI to find the most interesting/viral moments in your video.
cut.silence_desc: Detect and remove silent pauses from your clip. Choose a preset or fine-tune the detection.
cut.trim_desc: Set in/out points to extract a portion of your clip. Use timecodes or seconds.

export.auto_shorts_desc: Auto-generate short clips: transcribe, find highlights, reframe, add captions.
export.batch_desc: Apply the same operation to multiple files. Add files from your project bin, pick an operation, and run.
export.deliverables_desc: Generate post-production documents (VFX sheet, ADR list, music cue sheet, asset list) from the active sequence.
export.platform_desc: One-click export optimized for each platform's format, resolution, codec, and file size requirements.
export.thumbnail_desc: AI-scored thumbnail candidates from your video. Scores frames on sharpness, color, contrast, face presence, and composition.
error.backend_problem: OpenCut hit a local backend problem while handling that request. Try again or review the logs in Settings.
error.backend_unreachable: OpenCut couldn't reach the local backend. Restart it from Settings, then try again.
error.file_moved: The file may have been moved or deleted.
error.file_permission: OpenCut doesn't have permission to read or write that file. Check folder access, then try again.
error.file_not_found_reselect: File not found. Re-select your clip.
error.gpu_out_of_memory: GPU ran out of memory. Try CPU mode in Settings.
error.install_from_settings: You can install this from the Settings tab.
error.memory_retry: Try a smaller file, lower quality setting, or enable CPU mode in Settings.
error.operation_timeout: The operation took too long. Try a shorter clip or simpler settings.
error.permission_check: The file may be locked or read-only. Check your file permissions.
error.request_retry: OpenCut couldn't complete that request. Try again in a moment.
error.route_not_found: OpenCut couldn't find the local route for that action. Refresh the panel or restart the backend from Settings.
error.server_running: Make sure the OpenCut server is running.
error.source_missing: OpenCut couldn't find that source anymore. Re-select the clip or browse to it again.
error.timeout_retry: That run took too long to finish. Try a shorter clip, lighter settings, or rerun once the backend is idle.
error.too_many_jobs: Too many jobs running. Wait or cancel one.

onboarding.caption_body: Captions and stems both run locally via faster-whisper and Demucs.
onboarding.cut_body: The Cut tab removes pauses and filler words in one click.
onboarding.export_body: Export to 13 social presets or hand off to Premiere via OTIO/AAF.
onboarding.pick_clip_body: Choose any clip from your Premiere project or the media list above.
onboarding.ready: Ready to go — explore any tab
onboarding.welcome_body: AI-powered video editing automation, local-first, no cloud.

palette.description_ai_command: Jump to tools and edit actions from natural-language prompts.
palette.description_audio: Polish dialogue, stems, loudness, and generated sound from one audio surface.
palette.description_captions: Transcribe, translate, and shape subtitle deliverables without leaving the panel.
palette.description_cut: Tighten pacing, trims, and spoken edits from one focused cut workflow.
palette.description_default: Open tools across the editing workflow.
palette.description_denoise: Clean dialogue and reduce room noise before finishing.
palette.description_export: Build deliverables, thumbnails, and repeatable output presets faster.
palette.description_export_presets: Package platform-ready outputs without rebuilding settings.
palette.description_footage_search: Find usable shots from transcripts and semantic matches.
palette.description_generic: Open this tool and jump directly to the matching workspace.
palette.description_nlp: Use search and language-driven tools to find footage or trigger edit actions.
palette.description_reframe: Recompose shots for vertical, square, and alternate aspect ratios.
palette.description_settings: Adjust workspace defaults, templates, and system-level behavior.
palette.description_silence: Strip dead air and tighten spoken takes.
palette.description_styled_captions: Create branded subtitles with faster review passes.
palette.description_timeline: Write sequence edits and timeline metadata back into Premiere with more control.
palette.description_video: Repair, reframe, and finish image work with cleaner visual controls.
palette.empty_no_matches_body: Try a broader term like "audio", "captions", or "export".
palette.empty_ready_body: Recent runs and pinned favorites will appear here once you start using the workspace.
palette.status_empty: Run tools or pin favorites to shape this launcher around your workflow.
palette.status_ready: {label} tools, recent runs, and pinned shortcuts are ready.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
subtabs.subtitle: Subtitle
tabs.audio_desc: Repair dialogue, balance stems, check loudness, and prep timing cues.
tabs.captions_desc: Transcribe, edit, style, translate, and export caption assets.
tabs.cut_desc: Remove dead space, clean fillers, and review pacing from the active source.
tabs.default_desc: Focused tools for the current editing workflow.
tabs.export_desc: Package deliverables, presets, thumbnails, and repeatable workflows.
tabs.search_desc: Search footage and route editing commands from one command surface.
tabs.settings_desc: Manage backend health, models, defaults, templates, and diagnostics.
tabs.timeline_desc: Send markers, cuts, bins, and sequence changes back to Premiere.
tabs.video_desc: Analyze, repair, reframe, and finish image treatments for delivery.
timeline.apply_cuts_desc: Apply silence removal or repeat detection cuts directly to the active Premiere sequence.
timeline.beat_markers_desc: Detect beats in an audio track and add them as markers to the active Premiere sequence.
timeline.export_clips_desc: Read chapter/range markers from the active sequence and export each as a separate clip.
timeline.export_otio_desc: Export cuts/markers as OpenTimelineIO for DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut Pro, Avid, or any OTIO-compatible editor.
timeline.multicam_desc: Detect speakers and generate cut decisions for a multicam podcast timeline.
timeline.no_cuts_available: No cuts available. Run Silence Removal or Repeat Detection first.
timeline.no_markers_available: No markers available. Run Beat Detection or Chapter Generation first.
timeline.no_rules_yet: No rules yet. Click "+ Add Rule".
timeline.rename_desc: Rename project items in bulk with find/replace patterns or individual edits.
timeline.smart_bins_desc: Automatically organise project items into bins based on custom rules.

transcript.editor_empty: Transcribe a clip to start shaping dialogue, timing, and cut decisions.
transcript.timeline_empty_ready: Transcript segments will appear here once the clip is ready.
transcript.timeline_select_segment: Select a segment to focus the edit.
video.ai_desc: AI upscaling, background removal, frame interpolation, and video denoising.
video.broll_desc: Generate B-roll video clips from text descriptions using AI text-to-video models.
video.color_desc: Professional color controls: exposure, contrast, saturation, temperature, lift/gamma/gain.
video.composite_desc: Green/blue screen removal, PiP overlay, and blend modes. Select a foreground clip above.
video.depth_desc: AI depth estimation for bokeh simulation, parallax zoom, and depth map export.
video.diarize_desc: Combine audio speaker diarization with face recognition for accurate multicam speaker-camera mapping.
video.effects_desc: Stabilization, vignette, film grain, letterbox, chromakey, LUT, and color correction. No extra installs needed.
video.face_ai_desc: Enhance facial detail in low-quality footage, or swap faces between subjects. GPU recommended.
video.face_blur_desc: Automatically detect and blur all faces in your video for privacy. Choose between blur, pixelate, or black box.
video.lut_desc: Apply cinematic color grading via mathematically-generated .cube LUTs. 10 built-in looks + support for custom .cube files.
video.merge_desc: Join multiple clips into a single video file. Add clips using the batch picker or drag and drop.
video.particles_desc: Add confetti, sparkles, snow, rain, fire embers, smoke, or bubbles over your video.
video.reframe_desc: Resize and crop video to fit vertical (TikTok, Shorts, Reels), square, or custom dimensions. Smart crop keeps the important center content.
video.remove_desc: Remove a logo or watermark from a specific region of your video. Draw the area to erase.
video.scene_desc: Detect scene boundaries for chapter generation and segment-based editing.
video.trim_end_after_start: End time must be after start time.
video.social_desc: Upload exported videos directly to social media platforms.
video.speed_desc: Constant speed change, reverse playback, or keyframe-based speed ramps with easing presets.
video.style_desc: Transform your video into a painting  -- Van Gogh, Munch, stained glass, and more. Models download automatically on first use.
video.titles_desc: Create animated title cards and lower thirds with fade, slide, typewriter, and bounce effects.
video.transition_desc: 34 FFmpeg xfade transitions between clips. Select a clip above, provide a second clip path.
video.upscale_desc: Upscale low-resolution video to 2x, 3x, or 4x. Choose fast CPU or AI-powered GPU quality.
video.watermark_desc: Automatically detect and remove watermarks from videos and images. Works with AI-generated content and stock footage.
video.watermark_not_detected: No watermark detected. Try adjusting the prompt.
wave_h.card_desc: Share presets as gists, try demo footage, re-run the tour, score short-form clips, and send a pre-filled issue report. Commercial-parity helpers added in v1.25.0.
wave_h.note: Gist push defaults to a secret gist and requires GITHUB_TOKEN. Issue reports scrub HOME paths before opening the URL.
whisper.cpu_mode_enabled_status: CPU mode is enabled. Transcription will be slower, but it can be more stable on unsupported or memory-constrained GPUs.
whisper.cpu_mode_title: CPU mode is enabled for stability.
whisper.gpu_preferred_title: OpenCut will prefer GPU acceleration when available.
whisper.gpu_preferred_status: Transcription will prefer GPU acceleration when available and fall back gracefully when it is not.
whisper.gpu_preferred_summary: Transcription will prefer GPU acceleration when available.
whisper.install_required_title: Install Whisper before captions, search indexing, and chapter generation will run.
whisper.install_status: Install Whisper to enable transcription, subtitle export, search indexing, and transcript-driven tools.
whisper.install_status_title: Install Whisper to unlock transcription workflows.
whisper.install_summary: Install Whisper to enable captions, search indexing, and transcript-driven tools.
whisper.ready_cpu_status: Transcription is ready in CPU mode. Use this when GPU runs are unstable.
whisper.ready_cpu_summary: Transcription is available in CPU mode for stability.
whisper.ready_status: {backend} is ready for captions, search indexing, and chapter generation.
whisper.reconnect_device_title: Reconnect the backend to inspect transcription device settings.
whisper.reconnect_status: Reconnect the backend before reviewing or installing transcription services.
whisper.reconnect_status_title: Reconnect the backend to review transcription readiness.
whisper.speech_reconnect_title: Reconnect the backend to review Whisper readiness.
workspace.audio_idle_copy: Denoise, normalize, loudness-match, split stems, and build timing markers from one source.
workspace.audio_idle_title: Select media to start the audio pass.
workspace.audio_ready_copy: Move from repair to loudness to music-aware timing without reloading media.
workspace.audio_ready_title: Audio tools are ready for the active source.
workspace.captions_idle_copy: Create captions, subtitles, transcript cleanup, chapters, and translations from one source.
workspace.captions_idle_title: Select media to build transcript assets.
workspace.captions_ready_copy: Transcribe once, keep the text editable, then style, review, and export.
workspace.captions_ready_title: Caption tools are ready for the active source.
workspace.choose_clip_title: Choose a clip or drop media to start
workspace.cut_idle_copy: Choose a source, then remove dead air, clean fillers, and review pacing from the same workspace.
workspace.cut_idle_title: Select media to start the cut pass.
workspace.cut_ready_copy: Run cleanup, review proposed edits, and send approved changes back to Premiere.
workspace.cut_ready_title: Cut tools are ready for the active source.
workspace.export_idle_copy: Set platform presets, batch workflows, transcript exports, and thumbnails before the final pass.
workspace.export_ready_copy: Package exports, workflow presets, thumbnails, and handoff assets from the same context.
workspace.export_ready_title: Delivery tools are ready for the active source.
workspace.reconnect_copy: The workspace is still available, but processing, model checks, write-back, and timeline handoff need the local backend.
workspace.reconnect_title: Reconnect OpenCut to run processing jobs.
workspace.search_idle_copy: Index media, find clips by meaning, and send the next action to the right toolset.
workspace.search_ready_copy: Keep the current clip in context while you search, compare, and route follow-up actions.
workspace.search_ready_title: Search tools are ready for the active source.
workspace.settings_idle_copy: Check backend status, models, engine routing, templates, and diagnostics from one control center.
workspace.settings_ready_copy: Keep backend health, models, templates, engine routing, and diagnostics aligned with the current workflow.
workspace.settings_ready_title: Settings are ready for this session.
workspace.status_reconnect_title: Start or reconnect the local OpenCut backend service
workspace.status_select_media_title: Select a clip from Premiere or browse a local file to unlock processing
workspace.status_settings_ready_title: Settings does not require a source clip
workspace.status_source_ready_title: The active source is selected and ready for processing
workspace.timeline_idle_copy: Review cuts, markers, OTIO, renaming, and export tasks before writing back.
workspace.timeline_ready_copy: Send markers, multicam prep, clip management, and approved write-back actions to Premiere.
workspace.timeline_ready_title: Timeline tools are ready for the active source.
workspace.video_idle_copy: Analyze scenes, reframe shots, enhance image quality, and create social versions from one source.
workspace.video_ready_copy: Explore crops, color, scene detection, and short-form outputs without duplicate setup.
workspace.video_ready_title: Video tools are ready for the active source.

ws.hint_bridge_connect: The bridge is running. Connect live updates so longer jobs can stream progress into the panel.
ws.hint_bridge_waiting: The bridge is running and waiting for a panel connection. Connect live updates to stream progress without polling.
ws.hint_check_available: Checking whether the live updates bridge is available.
ws.hint_check_connected: Checking listener status for the active panel connection.
ws.hint_flowing: Live updates are flowing into the panel right now. Progress, completion, and cancel events will stay visible here.
ws.hint_panel_waiting: The panel is connected. Progress will appear here as soon as a job starts streaming updates.
ws.hint_start_bridge: Start the bridge to stream progress, completion, and cancel feedback into the panel during longer runs.
ws.overview_limited: Most features still run, but live progress and completion feedback are limited until the bridge is running.
ws.status_read_failed: Couldn't read the live updates bridge status. Reconnect the backend or try again.
ws.status_read_failed_short: Couldn't read the live updates bridge status.
ws.studio_panel_title: The panel is connected to the live updates bridge.
